name: EcoSystem AEC + Regulatory - 27 Agentes de IA
description: 27 Agentes de IA para Engenharia de Producao, Arquitetura, Engenharia e Construcao (AEC), Conformidade Regulatoria Brasileira e Integracao Microsoft 365. Sistema completo com 5 agentes AEC (Spec Analyst, Procurement, Inventory, Logistics, Field Execution), 4 especializados (BIM Coordinator, Requirements Analyst, Engineering Assistant, Work Synopsis), 3 de conformidade AEC (Photo Intelligence, RFI Creation, Compliance), 9 regulatorios (NR-1 Psicossocial, Tributario CBS/IBS, LGPD, ESG IFRS, Inventario de Carbono, Escopo 3, Canal de Denuncias, Igualdade Salarial, Compliance Anticorrupcao) e 6 de integracao Microsoft (Regulatory Analyst, Compliance PM, Channel Agent, Knowledge Agent, Facilitator Agent, Dev Experience).

plans.name: Starter - Spec Analyst
plans.description: 1 agente de IA: Spec Analyst para analise de especificacoes tecnicas, extracao de requisitos e sinalizacao de nao-conformidades.

plans.name: Professional - 3 Agentes
plans.description: 3 agentes: Spec Analyst + Procurement + Inventory. Analise, compras e estoque automatizados.

plans.name: Enterprise - 5 Agentes AEC
plans.description: 5 agentes: Spec Analyst, Procurement, Inventory, Logistics, Field Execution. Nucleo completo AEC com logistica e campo.

plans.name: Full Suite - 27 Agentes
plans.description: Todos os 27 agentes de IA: AEC, especializados, conformidade, regulatorios e Microsoft. Pacote completo.

plans.name: Compliance Pack - PGRS/PGRSS
plans.description: 3 agentes: Photo Intelligence, RFI Creation, Compliance Agent. Gestao de conformidade AEC.

plans.name: Regulatory Starter - NR-1 + LGPD
plans.description: 2 agentes regulatorios: NR-1 Psicossocial + LGPD Operacional. Inventario de riscos e conformidade ANPD.

plans.name: Regulatory Professional - 5 Agentes
plans.description: 5 agentes: NR-1, LGPD, Canal de Denuncias, Igualdade Salarial, Compliance Anticorrupcao.

plans.name: Regulatory Full - 9 Agentes
plans.description: Todos os 9 agentes regulatorios: NR-1, Tributario, LGPD, ESG, Carbono, Escopo 3, Denuncias, Igualdade, Anticorrupcao.

plans.name: ESG + Carbono
plans.description: 3 agentes: ESG IFRS S1/S2, Inventario de Carbono, Escopo 3 Fornecedores. Sustentabilidade e GHG Protocol.

plans.name: Microsoft Pack - 6 Agentes
plans.description: 6 agentes de integracao Microsoft 365: Regulatory Analyst, Compliance PM, Channel Agent, Knowledge Agent, Facilitator Agent, Dev Experience. SharePoint, Teams, Planner, Graph API.
